creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Update CyberChef from 9.7.1 to 9.7.2

Changelog:
Fixed typo in 'Convert Data Units' preventing Kilobits from working
Fixed webm signature
Merge branch 'forge-update' of https://github.com/cbeuw/CyberChef (from 0.8.5 to 0.9.1)
Merge branch 'master' into edit-node-recipe

New Features:
Added support for many more file types to file signature operations like gimp imahes, jpeg, f4v, pdf ..
